title: remove stray ArenaBanner import bleeding into rendered body
description:
## Summary
- Removes the spurious `import ArenaBanner from '../components/arena/ArenaBanner.svelte';` line that Gemini had placed **after** the closing `---` of each Astro layout, where it was being rendered as visible text at the top of every page on web.mentolder.de (and would have hit web.korczewski.de too).
- Adds the actually intended `<ArenaBanner client:load />` component as the first child of each `<body>`, as the Arena Plan 1 ("Modify — website/") section called for.
- Affects `Layout.astro`, `AdminLayout.astro`, `PortalLayout.astro` — net diff is +3 / −3 lines (one fix per file).

## Test plan
- [ ] After merge: `task website:deploy ENV=mentolder` and `task website:deploy ENV=korczewski`
- [ ] Visit https://web.mentolder.de while logged in — no literal import line visible at top of page
- [ ] Visit https://web.korczewski.de while logged in — same check
- [ ] `<ArenaBanner client:load />` is dormant (state.phase === 'idle') until an admin opens a lobby, so it should render nothing by default; verify no extra whitespace/layout shift at top of `/`, `/admin`, `/portal`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
